From-To: open->closed

Try to remove /usr/obj/usr, then do a "make cleandir" from /usr/src 
and run "make buildworld" again. 
Anyway, the correct place for this kind of problems is the 
freebsd-questions@freebsd.org mailing list or the freebsd-stable one.
